${mod_id}.modmenu.category.general.name: §lGeneral
${mod_id}.modmenu.group.main.name: §lMain
${mod_id}.modmenu.group.dithering_option: Distance at which nearby blocks fade out via dithering
${mod_id}.modmenu.group.presets.name: §lPresets
${mod_id}.modmenu.group.presets.descript: Switch the whitelist and blacklist to a preset. Each preset keeps its own edits.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.preset_glass_ic: Only glass blocks, glass panes and ice.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.preset_custom.d: Starts empty so you can build your own selection. Your edits are kept.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.dither_near_dis: Camera distance (blocks) at which a block is fully faded. Lower = fades closer to you.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.dither_far_dist: Camera distance (blocks) past which a block is fully solid (vanilla look).
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.dither_pixel_si: Size of the dither dots in pixels. Higher = chunkier fade.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.dither_min_visi: Lowest visibility a block can fade to. 0 = can fully disappear.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.dither_blocks_w: Blocks that fade with dithering. Use a block id (minecraft:glass), a tag (#minecraft:leaves), or a wildcard over the id (minecraft:dead_*coral* or *coral*) for groups with no tag. Fully solid view-blocking blocks (stone, dirt, ...) are ignored to prevent X-ray. Applies immediately on save.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.dither_blocks_b: Blocks/tags/wildcards that are NEVER dithered, even if matched by the whitelist. Higher priority than the whitelist — e.g. add minecraft:ladder to exclude it from #minecraft:climbable. Same format: block id, #tag, or *wildcard*.
